title: Surface provider cooldowns in model routes
goal: Make model route metadata reflect active provider/model cooldowns so UI and route inspection show reactive rate-limit state without changing request execution semantics.
completionConditions: OpenAI model routes become unavailable and include a compact rate-limit cooldown detail while their provider/model cooldown is active.
OpenRouter routes use the shared openrouter cooldown scope even when the route provider label is an endpoint/provider name.
Existing route details are preserved when cooldown detail is added.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Follow-up to issue #27. Keep this observational: route metadata only, no failover or execution behavior changes.
